Container.Name: abs-stats
Container.Overview:
Companion service for Achievement Engine. Connects to your Audiobookshelf server, aggregates listening data, and exposes it as a REST API that Achievement Engine polls.
This container is REQUIRED for Achievement Engine to function. You will need an Audiobookshelf API token for each user you want to track.
Container.Requires: Audiobookshelf must be running and accessible from this server. You need API tokens for each user you want to track.

Config.Name: data
Config.Description: Host folder for abs-stats appdata. Creates the /mnt/user/appdata/abs-stats directory in Unraid.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: The port abs-stats listens on. Other containers (like Achievement Engine) connect to this port to fetch listening data. Change the host port if 3000 is already in use.

Config.Name: ABS_URL
Config.Description: The full URL of your Audiobookshelf server, including the port. Example: http://192.168.1.50:13378

Config.Name: ABS_TOKEN
Config.Description: A single Audiobookshelf API token for single-user setups. Get it from: Audiobookshelf > Settings > Users > your user > API Token. Leave empty if using ABS_TOKENS for multiple users.

Config.Name: ABS_TOKENS
Config.Description: Multi-user API tokens. Format: username1:token1,username2:token2 — one entry per user. Leave empty if using ABS_TOKEN for single-user mode.

Config.Name: ENGINE_URL
Config.Description: Internal URL of the Achievement Engine container. If both containers are on the same Docker network, use the container name (e.g. http://achievement-engine:8000).

Config.Name: ALLOWED_USERNAMES
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of Audiobookshelf usernames to track. Set to * or leave empty to track all users.

Config.Name: DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL
Config.Description: Discord webhook URL for posting achievement notifications. Leave empty to disable Discord notifications.
